chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-163 of 2018 Raheem Shaikh Versus PTCL & another Date Order with signature of Judge For order as to maintainability of petition. Dated: 15.02.2021 Mr. S. Ansar Hussain Zaidi for petitioner. Mr. S. Mustafa Ali for respondent No.1. -.-.- Learned counsel for petitioner, on instructions, does not press this petition which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with pending application. Judge Judge
